output: Completed batch 2 tasks `T2` and `T3`. `useShotGroups.test.ts` now covers pinned-only behavior and passes as a full module, and `TimelineEditor.tsx` no longer computes or passes `finalVideoShotIds`, instead using the simplified `useShotGroups(rows, shots, pinnedShotGroups)` call and forwarding `finalVideoMap` to `TimelineCanvas`. task_updates.executor_notes: Rewrote `useShotGroups.test.ts` for pinned-only behavior: removed all inference-era coverage, updated the pinned-group assertion to the 3-argument hook signature without `isPinned`, and added edge cases for undefined pinned groups, missing tracks, and dead clip ids. Verification: `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.test.ts` passed with 5/5 tests.

Simplified `TimelineEditor.tsx` by deleting `resolveFinalVideoShotIds`, removing the `finalVideoShotIds` memo and `ShotFinalVideo`/dismissed-id wiring, updating `useShotGroups` to the new 3-argument signature, removing the dead pin/dismiss canvas props, and passing `finalVideoMap` through instead. Static verification: grep confirms the removed symbols no longer exist in the file, while the updated `useShotGroups(...)` call and `finalVideoMap={finalVideoMap}` prop are present. Full typecheck is deferred to the later validation batch because `TimelineCanvas` still needs its corresponding prop/interface update in T4.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed. All inference-related `useShotGroups` tests were removed, the pinned-group test now uses `useShotGroups(rows, shots, pinnedShotGroups)` without `isPinned`, and new coverage was added for undefined pinned groups, missing tracks, and dead clip ids. The full `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useShotGroups.test.ts` module passes.

Confirmed. `resolveFinalVideoShotIds` and the `finalVideoShotIds` memo are deleted, `useShotGroups` is now called with the simplified 3-argument signature, and `TimelineEditor` passes `finalVideoMap` to `TimelineCanvas` instead. The matching `TimelineCanvas` prop/interface change is intentionally deferred to T4.
